title: How to remove a baseline?
excerpt: I created a baseline by mistake. I want to remove it. Is it possible? If so, how?

posts.author: ubaldot (Ubaldo)
posts.cookedHtml: I created a baseline by mistake. I want to remove it. Is it possible? If so, how?

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:

posts.author: ubaldot (Ubaldo)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks! However that hides baselines, it doesn’t cancel them.

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi@ubaldot,
you can hide it ,but there is no option to delete it

posts.author: jessnzime (Jess Milton)
posts.cookedHtml: If you go to the main table view, the baseline will show as a column. You can just delete that column
